title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
About the questions
Below are the types of questions you’ll see:

Multiple-choice

The easiest question to get yourself situated

Open

It gets a little harder when you don’t have options anymore

Ranking

Can you put them in the right order?

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
About the questions, cont’d

Sound-bite

I’ll play a sound clip and you’ll have to answer the question related to it

Range

Unlike the other questions so far, whoever is closest will get this point

Who/What am I?

You’ll get 3 clues, if you can get the person/object on the first clue that’ll be worth 3 points, 2 for the second clue, and 1 for the last clue–pending you get the right answer

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
About the scoring
We’ll calculate the differentials between the mastermind and the rest of the team–whoever has the highest differential wins.
However, if there is a tie I have some volleyball trivia questions to break it.

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 1

Alex - Veep

Julia Louis-Dreyfus won the Primetime Emmy for Outstanding Lead Actress in a Comedy Series due to her performance in each of the first 6 seasons of Veep. She was nominated for the 7th season but lost to whom?

Catherine O’Hara for Schitt’s Creek as Moira Rose
Phoebe Waller-Bridge for Fleabag
Natasha Lyonne for Russian Doll as Nadia
Christina Applegate for Dead to Me as Jen

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 2

Alex - Veep

What does Vice President Selina Meyer wear in the first scene of every first episode of each season?

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 3

Alex - Veep

List these guests in chronological order of appearance.

Patton Oswalt as Teddy Sykes
Rhea Seehorn as Michelle York
Hugh Laurie as Tom James
Christopher Meloni as Ray Whelans
Clea DuVall as Majorie Palmiotti

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:

Alex - Veep

title: Mastermind Trivia

Alex - Veep

title: Mastermind Trivia

Fact 1
Fact 2

title: Mastermind Trivia

Question 6

Michael - Yacht Rock

What band am I?


I composed (most of the) soundtrack for the 1984 movie Dune
I was formed by David Paich and Jeff Porcaro in 1977
As I’ve said many times, “It’s going to take a lot to drag me away from you”

Question 6
Who am I?


I am an inanimate object that Charles Boyle aggressively tracks down because I am allegedly “haunted” by the spirit of a 1920s mobster’s mistress.
Charles leaves me to Jake and Amy in his will.
I require a highly specific, disgusting daily feeding ritual and I am the secret behind the Boyle family’s legendary pizza crust.

I am an inanimate object that Charles Boyle aggressively tracks down because I am allegedly “haunted” by the spirit of a 1920s mobster’s mistress.
Charles leaves me to Jake and Amy in his will.
I require a highly specific, disgusting daily feeding ritual and I am the secret behind the Boyle family’s legendary pizza crust.

The Motherdough

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 1
Which of the following well-known 1960s bands is not considered a pioneer of heavy metal?

Led Zeppelin
The Rolling Stones
Deep Purple
Black Sabbath

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 2
This northern European city was considered an early metal music hub
Gothenburg, Sweden

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 3
Order the “mainstream” appearance of each submetal genre from earliest to latest:

Thrash Metal (1980s)
Death Metal (mid 1980s)
Doom Metal (late 1980s - early 90s)
Grunge Metal (mid 1990s)
Alternative Metal (early 2000s)

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:

Evanescence

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:

143,910,465

title: Mastermind Trivia
text:
Question 6
What am I?

This style evolved out of progressive metal.
This style heavily uses syncopated riffs, distortions and polyrhythms.
This style characteristically uses 7, 8 or even 9 stringed-guitars.

Djent
